# Bug

data-di-copy-label="true">Copy RSX</span></button></div></div>

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Bug;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Bug { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
issue, error, defect, testing, troubleshoot, problem, report, debug, code, insect, beetle

## Categories
development, animals

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/bug)
